initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_sales,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS web_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    WHERE d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag, d.d_year
),
yearly_aggregates AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales END) AS store_sales_2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales END) AS web_sales_2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales END) AS store_sales_2002,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales END) AS web_sales_2002
    FROM yearly_sales
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM yearly_aggregates
WHERE store_sales_2001 IS NOT NULL 
  AND store_sales_2002 IS NOT NULL 
  AND web_sales_2001 IS NOT NULL 
  AND web_sales_2002 IS NOT NULL
  AND (web_sales_2002 / web_sales_2001) > (store_sales_2002 / store_sales_2001)
ORDER BY c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

WITH sales_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        'store' AS channel,
        SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS sales_amount
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag, d.d_year

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        'web' AS channel,
        SUM(ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_discount_amt) AS sales_amount
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag, d.d_year
),
yearly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'store' AND d_year = 2001 THEN sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'web' AND d_year = 2001 THEN sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'store' AND d_year = 2002 THEN sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales_2002,
        SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'web' AND d_year = 2002 THEN sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_2002
    FROM 
        sales_by_year
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        store_sales_2001,
        web_sales_2001,
        store_sales_2002,
        web_sales_2002
    FROM 
        yearly_totals
    WHERE 
        store_sales_2001 > 0 
        AND web_sales_2001 > 0 
        AND store_sales_2002 > 0 
        AND web_sales_2002 > 0
        AND (web_sales_2002 * 1.0 / web_sales_2001) > (store_sales_2002 * 1.0 / store_sales_2001)
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM 
    filtered_customers
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id ASC, 
    c_first_name ASC, 
    c_last_name ASC, 
    c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH year_total AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year,
        SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_sales,
        SUM(ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_discount_amt) AS web_sales
    FROM 
        customer,
        store_sales,
        web_sales,
        date_dim
    WHERE 
        c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
        AND c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
        AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        AND d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year
),
store_yoy AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2002
    FROM 
        year_total
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag
),
web_yoy AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2002
    FROM 
        year_total
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag
)
SELECT 
    s.c_customer_id,
    s.c_first_name,
    s.c_last_name,
    s.c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM 
    store_yoy s
JOIN 
    web_yoy w
    ON s.c_customer_sk = w.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
    s.store_2001 > 0
    AND s.store_2002 > 0
    AND w.web_2001 > 0
    AND w.web_2002 > 0
    AND (w.web_2002 * 1.0 / w.web_2001) > (s.store_2002 * 1.0 / s.store_2001)
ORDER BY 
    s.c_customer_id,
    s.c_first_name,
    s.c_last_name,
    s.c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

WITH year_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales_2002,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_2002
    FROM customer
    JOIN store_sales ON c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ON c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM year_totals
WHERE store_sales_2001 > 0 
  AND web_sales_2001 > 0 
  AND store_sales_2002 > 0 
  AND web_sales_2002 > 0
  AND (web_sales_2002 / web_sales_2001) > (store_sales_2002 / store_sales_2001)
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC, c_first_name ASC, c_last_name ASC, c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_sales,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS web_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    WHERE d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag, d.d_year
),
customer_totals AS (
    SELECT
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2002,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2002
    FROM yearly_sales
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
    HAVING store_2001 > 0 AND web_2001 > 0 AND store_2002 > 0 AND web_2002 > 0
)
SELECT
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM customer_totals
WHERE (web_2002 * 1.0 / web_2001) > (store_2002 * 1.0 / store_2001)
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC, c_first_name ASC, c_last_name ASC, c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100;

candidates.sql:
WITH year_total AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ss.ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ws.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales
    FROM 
        customer c
    INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    INNER JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk AND ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year
),
yoy AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2002,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2002
    FROM 
        year_total
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM 
    yoy
WHERE 
    store_2001 > 0 AND store_2002 > 0
    AND web_2001 > 0 AND web_2002 > 0
    AND (web_2002 * 1.0 / web_2001) > (store_2002 * 1.0 / store_2001)
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

WITH year_total AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ss.ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ws.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AND ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN date_dim d ON (ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk OR ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk)
    WHERE 
        d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales ELSE 0 END) AS store_2002,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales ELSE 0 END) AS web_2002
    FROM year_total
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM 
    filtered_customers
WHERE 
    store_2001 > 0 AND store_2002 > 0
    AND web_2001 > 0 AND web_2002 > 0
    AND (web_2002 * 1.0 / web_2001) > (store_2002 * 1.0 / store_2001)
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

candidates.sql:
WITH store_sales_2001 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS total_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag
),
store_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS total_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag
),
web_sales_2001 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS total_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag
),
web_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS total_sales
    FROM customer c
    JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, c.c_preferred_cust_flag
),
combined AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(s2001.c_customer_sk, s2002.c_customer_sk, w2001.c_customer_sk, w2002.c_customer_sk) AS c_customer_sk,
        COALESCE(s2001.c_customer_id, s2002.c_customer_id, w2001.c_customer_id, w2002.c_customer_id) AS c_customer_id,
        COALESCE(s2001.c_first_name, s2002.c_first_name, w2001.c_first_name, w2002.c_first_name) AS c_first_name,
        COALESCE(s2001.c_last_name, s2002.c_last_name, w2001.c_last_name, w2002.c_last_name) AS c_last_name,
        COALESCE(s2001.c_preferred_cust_flag, s2002.c_preferred_cust_flag, w2001.c_preferred_cust_flag, w2002.c_preferred_cust_flag) AS c_preferred_cust_flag,
        COALESCE(s2001.total_sales, 0) AS store_2001,
        COALESCE(s2002.total_sales, 0) AS store_2002,
        COALESCE(w2001.total_sales, 0) AS web_2001,
        COALESCE(w2002.total_sales, 0) AS web_2002
    FROM store_sales_2001 s2001
    FULL JOIN store_sales_2002 s2002 ON s2001.c_customer_sk = s2002.c_customer_sk
    FULL JOIN web_sales_2001 w2001 ON COALESCE(s2001.c_customer_sk, s2002.c_customer_sk) = w2001.c_customer_sk
    FULL JOIN web_sales_2002 w2002 ON COALESCE(s2001.c_customer_sk, s2002.c_customer_sk, w2001.c_customer_sk) = w2002.c_customer_sk
    WHERE COALESCE(s2001.c_customer_sk, s2002.c_customer_sk, w2001.c_customer_sk, w2002.c_customer_sk) IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM combined
WHERE 
    store_2001 > 0 
    AND web_2001 > 0 
    AND store_2002 > 0 
    AND web_2002 > 0
    AND (web_2002 * 1.0 / web_2001) > (store_2002 * 1.0 / store_2001)
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id ASC, 
    c_first_name ASC, 
    c_last_name ASC, 
    c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH store_sales_2001 AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS sales
    FROM 
        store_sales ss
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year = 2001
    GROUP BY 
        ss.ss_customer_sk
),
store_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS sales
    FROM 
        store_sales ss
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY 
        ss.ss_customer_sk
),
web_sales_2001 AS (
    SELECT 
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS sales
    FROM 
        web_sales ws
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year = 2001
    GROUP BY 
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
),
web_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS sales
    FROM 
        web_sales ws
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY 
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
),
customer_yearly AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        COALESCE(s2001.sales, 0) AS store_sales_2001,
        COALESCE(w2001.sales, 0) AS web_sales_2001,
        COALESCE(s2002.sales, 0) AS store_sales_2002,
        COALESCE(w2002.sales, 0) AS web_sales_2002
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        store_sales_2001 s2001 ON c.c_customer_sk = s2001.ss_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        store_sales_2002 s2002 ON c.c_customer_sk = s2002.ss_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        web_sales_2001 w2001 ON c.c_customer_sk = w2001.customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        web_sales_2002 w2002 ON c.c_customer_sk = w2002.customer_sk
    WHERE 
        s2001.sales IS NOT NULL 
        AND w2001.sales IS NOT NULL 
        AND s2002.sales IS NOT NULL 
        AND w2002.sales IS NOT NULL
        AND s2001.sales > 0 
        AND w2001.sales > 0 
        AND s2002.sales > 0 
        AND w2002.sales > 0
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM 
    customer_yearly
WHERE 
    (web_sales_2002 * 1.0 / web_sales_2001) > (store_sales_2002 * 1.0 / store_sales_2001)
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id ASC, 
    c_first_name ASC, 
    c_last_name ASC, 
    c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100;
